title: Australian Pistachio Crispy Bowl
description: A crispy Italian-inspired bowl filled with pistachio-crusted australian meat, served with a side of fresh pasta.

ingredients.name: Australian Steak
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality australian steak for best results.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking the steak and pasta.

ingredients.name: Fresh Pasta
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought pasta for a delicious side dish.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: For seasoning the steak and pasta.

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: For seasoning the steak and pasta.

instructions: Season the steak with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the steak to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the steak to a baking sheet and top with pistachios.
Bake the steak in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Cook the fresh pasta according to package instructions.
Serve the steak with the cooked pasta and a side of your favorite sauce.
Enjoy your delicious Australian Pistachio Crispy Bowl!
